channel.title: cmdb on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in cmdb on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: Neo4J CMDB pt2 - Active Directory Export
item.description:
This is the second post in a series on creating a graph database CMDB.

In this post we will export data from Microsoft Active Directory to use in the Neo4J CMDB. In a tradational on-premises Windows enterprise, there is usually a goldmine of information in AD.
In a later post we will import the data into Neo4J and link it to the device information from MEMCM that we exported in Part 1.

Part 1: Exporting data from MEMCM (SCCM)
Part 2: This article

item.title: Neo4J CMDB pt1 - MEMCM Export
item.description:
This is the first post in a series on creating a graph database CMDB.

In part one we’ll cover exporting computer information from Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager (a.k.a SCCM) using PowerShell and T-SQL. MEMCM is one datasource used to create a configuration management database (CMDB) using a Neo4j graph database.

Part 1: This article
Part 2: How to export computer information from Microsoft Active Directory using PowerShell, for use in a Neo4j CMDB
